description_long: This object depicts the head and upper neck of a raccoon, featuring a distinctive black and white facial mask with prominent dark eye patches and a white snout. The fur texture is rendered with a coarse, slightly matted appearance, and the mouth is partially open, revealing small teeth. The ears are short and rounded, blending into the dark fur on the sides of the head. The eyes are large, dark, and expressive, set within the characteristic black mask. The overall coloration is a mix of black, gray, and white, with the fur patterning providing a realistic representation of a raccoon's head. The object appears hollow and lightweight, with visible polygonal edges and some surface irregularities.
description: A raccoon head with a black and white facial mask, coarse fur texture, and expressive dark eyes. The mouth is slightly open, and the object has a hollow, polygonal structure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open mouth, white snout, and the full black and white facial mask.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rounded ear, side profile of the snout, and the transition from black to white fur.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the symmetrical black mask, large eyes, and the overall triangular head shape.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the ear, side of the face, and the fur pattern along the jawline.
attribute_plumage_pattern: bold facial mask with dark eye patches and contrasting white snout
